offers.name: When You Spend $75 on your next Online Order.
offers.description: Redeemable on your next Online Order. Standard exclusions apply.*
offers.disclaimer: *THIS OFFER: Not valid on orders fulfilled by Instacart. Order by 5/19/2026. Minimum $75 purchase required. MINIMUM PURCHASE CALCULATED BASED ON SUBTOTAL OF ALL QUALIFYING ITEMS IN CART AT CHECKOUT, EXCLUDING ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES (WHERE AVAILABLE), TOBACCO AND FLUID DAIRY PRODUCTS. Add offer to your loyalty account prior to online check-out. Offers are personalized to the loyalty account holder and cannot be assigned or transferred. LIMIT 1 PER HOUSEHOLD. Using multiple accounts to exceed limits on offers and promotions is not permitted. We reserve the right to terminate accounts if we believe they are used for such activities. May not be combined with any other free/reduced delivery or service fee offer. Any negative balance/credit amount shown resulting from Promo Codes, coupons, or other discounts and offers, will be adjusted to $0. We reserve the right to modify or cancel offers and/or to correct typographical, pictorial and other ad or pricing errors. ALL ORDERS: Service available in select areas. In some areas, service may be provided by another Albertsons Companies store banner (that banner’s product availability, pricing and promotions will apply) or a third party service provider; or independently by Instacart (Instacart’s terms and conditions, account registration, fees, product availability, pricing and promotions apply). Online orders require a minimum purchase, unless otherwise noted. Prices for products you order online are based on the price catalog in use at the store that prepares your order for pickup or delivery. The time of day that price updates occur may differ between the store preparing your order and online. You will receive the prices applicable at the time your order is prepared for pickup or delivery. Clearance, single-store, and in-store-only specials or promotions may not be available to online orders. Full terms at albertsonscompanies.com/about-us/our-policies/terms-of-use.html

offers.name: Panera Gift Cards!
offers.description: When you purchase $25 in Panera Gift Cards!
offers.disclaimer: POINTS Use Points on grocery items, discounts on gas at participating fuel stations, or automatic cash off at checkout. One Point will be awarded for each whole dollar spent using your Albertsons Companies for U™ account on eligible/qualifying grocery and pharmacy purchases, and two Points will be earned for each whole dollar spent to purchase eligible gift cards. EXCLUSIONS Eligible/qualifying purchases for Points exclude: (1) alcoholic beverages and tobacco products; (2) fuel and automotive services; (3) bus/commuter passes, fishing/hunting licenses and tags, ski/amusement park passes, stamps, money orders/transfers, lottery/event tickets; (4) any financial instrument that can be redeemed for goods or services at participating Albertsons Companies banner stores - including (but not limited to) gift certificates, money orders/transfers, and gift or debit cards issued by American Express®, MasterCard®, Visa®, any bank, or any Albertsons Companies banner store; (5) phone cards; (6) fuel gift cards, including but not limited to Filling Participant gift cards; and (7) fluid dairy items in the refrigerated dairy section—including fluid dairy substitutes, depending on state and local laws. Bottle/container deposits, applicable taxes, fees, and other charges, if applicable, are not purchases and are not eligible to accrue Points. For pharmacy purchases, only your out-of-pocket costs (e.g., prescription co-pays) are eligible to earn Points. EXPIRATION Points will expire within two calendar months, including the month they are earned. For example, if 100 Points are earned in January, those 100 Points will be available to use until the end of February. Points do not expire for FreshPass® (where available) subscribers. VALUE/TRANSFERABILITY OF POINTS Points have no cash value and are not exchangeable for cash. The accumulation of points does not entitle Program Members to any vested rights, and we and our grocery banners do not guarantee in any way the continued availability of any Rewards, Points, redemption level, rebate, or any other benefit. Weassume no liability to Program Members for the addition or deletion of items in the Program Member’s for U™ account for which Points can be collected and/or used. Points cannot be assigned, exchanged, traded, bartered, purchased, or given by gift or otherwise sold or transferred. Any Points acquired in a prohibited way will be void. In the event of a return/exchange of any eligible/qualifying purchase that initially earned Points, such Points will be deducted automatically from the for U™ account that was used for the eligible purchase (whether the account number is presented at the time of return and/or exchange). Points will be deducted at the same rate as they were earned. Upon the return and/or exchange of products awarded through the redemption of Points, all used Points will be forfeited. Rewards Terms Gas Rewards Terms Every 100 Points equals 10 cents off per gallon at participating owned and partner fuel stations. Gas reward savings in a single fuel transaction are limited (i) to 25 gallons for one vehicle per transaction––subject to rounding ; (ii) to the maximum per-gallon gas rewards discount available at our partner fuel stations (typically limited to 20 cents off per gallon) and $1.00 off per gallon at owned fuel stations; and to any transaction dollar limits that your financial institution may place on your payment card. To use rewards for gas, you must establish eligibility by entering the phone number used to register your for U™ account before pumping fuel. Points will be available for use at fuel stations approximately one hour after being earned. Gas rewards may be temporarily unavailable for immediate use due to technical or maintenance issues. Gas rewards may be redeemed only at Albertsons Companies’ grocery banner stores fuel stations and at participating partner fuel stations (“participating fuel stations”). Gas rewards are not available in the Jewel-Osco market area. One-Touch Fuel™, Scan & Pay, Fast Forward and SmartCheck are not accepted as forms of payment at participating fuel stations. Grocery Rewards Terms Grocery Rewards are available only under the Albertsons Companies grocery banner store that offers such rewards and are not transferable to other Albertsons Companies grocery banners. To use Points for groceries, you must use the phone number associated with your for U™ account when checking out in-store or online.  To use your Points for a grocery Rewards item, the accrued Points balance in your for U™ account must equal or exceed the grocery Rewards requirement of that offer; no partial grocery Rewards will be applied. Once you elect to use Points toward grocery Rewards offer and confirm your offer selection, the applicable Points will be deducted from your for U™ account. Grocery Rewards may be temporarily unavailable for immediate use due to technical or maintenance issues. Rewards may be reclaimed for reuse until the expiration date specified on the grocery Reward offer. Removing a confirmed grocery Reward offer from “My List”; will not restore Points applied. There may be a lag between the time when you use your Points and when your Points balance is updated. Attempting to reuse Points that have already been applied may result in a negative Points balance until you accumulate enough Points to eliminate such a deficit. Automatic Cash Off Terms Auto cash off is an opt-in feature you can use to save by automatically turning your Points into cash off of purchases. Once you opt in, your Points will automatically convert to cash off at your next purchase. Every 100 Points will convert to $1 cash off at the time of checkout. If your Points balance exceeds the dollar value of your transaction, the Points that apply in that transaction will be one hundred less than your current Points balance. For example, if your grocery bill is $14.96 and you have 1500 Points available, 1400 Points will trigger at the point of checkout and you will receive $14 off in savings. Auto cash off cannot be converted to or used as cash. No cash value to Points other than as cash off at purchase. Note that the Grocery Rewards Gallery will no longer be available once opted into automatic cash off, however you can continue to use Points for gas rewards while opted in (as long as you have an available balance). You can opt out of auto cash off at any time. Should you opt out, the Grocery Rewards Gallery will become available, and your Points will not be converted into cash off at your purchases..

offers.name: On Participating Products
offers.description: Look for tags in store. Redeem points for discounts & free products.
offers.disclaimer: *YOUR MAXIMUM GAS REWARD IS $1 PER GALLON AT ALBERTSONS COMPANIES BANNER GAS STATIONS. You accrue one Point for each whole dollar you spend using your Club Card (or entering your telephone number) for ELIGIBLE PURCHASES; for example, if you spend $5.25 you will accrue 5 Points. You may redeem Points only in increments of 100 (each 100 Points equal 1 “reward”): 100 Points = 10¢ per gallon gas reward, 200 Points = 20¢ per gallon gas reward. Point totals of less than 100 (remainders) expire within two calendar months, including the month they are earned in. For example, Points accrued in January expire at the end of February. You may use Points accrued during each month for gas or grocery rewards only through the end of the following calendar month (for example, Rewards accrued in January expire at the end of February). Gas reward savings are limited to 25 gallons for one vehicle per transaction—subject to rounding for Filling Participant in-store fuel transactions and to any transaction dollar limits that your financial institution may place on your payment card. Gas rewards will be available for use at participating Filling Participant stations approximately 4 hours after accrual. In order to redeem gas rewards, you must establish eligibility before pumping fuel. Gas rewards may be redeemed only at Safeway, Acme, Shaws, Jewel, Vons, Randalls, Tom Thumb, Albertsons and Carrs/Safeway branded fuel stations (collectively, “Albertsons Companies Banner stores”) and at participating Filling Participant stations. We may, from time to time, offer grocery rewards to which you may apply accrued rewards. To redeem grocery rewards, you must first register and create an online account (“Account”). You can then access the participating Albertsons Companies Banner stores’ mobile apps or websites to view the grocery reward offers and make your selections. In order to redeem your rewards for an item, the accrued rewards balance in your Account must equal or exceed the value of a grocery rewards offer assigned to that item. Once you select a grocery reward offer and confirm your selection, the applicable rewards are deducted from your Account and cannot be used for another grocery reward offer or as a gas reward. Removing a confirmed grocery reward offer from “My List” will not restore points applied. Please allow up to one hour after redeeming rewards for your rewards balance to be updated. Attempting to reuse rewards that have already been redeemed or applied may result in your rewards balance falling below zero until you accumulate enough rewards to eliminate such deficit. You may claim your redeemed grocery reward offer for an item to be picked up in-store through the end of the following calendar month (for example, grocery rewards offer items redeemed and confirmed in April are available to claim through the end of May). You must pay all applicable taxes and bottle/container deposits for items claimed. See full program details in the Albertsons Companies Banner stores’ mobile apps or websites. ELIGIBLE PURCHASES do not include: (1) beer, wine and tobacco products (and spirits in certain states); (2) automotive services; (3) bus/commuter passes, fishing/hunting licenses and tags, ski/amusement park passes, stamps, lottery/event tickets; (4) any financial instrument that can be redeemed for goods or services at participating Albertsons Companies Banner stores - including (but not limited to) gift certificates, money orders/transfers, and gift or debit cards issued by American Express®, MasterCard®, Visa®, NetSpend®, PayPower™, Green Dot®, Univision Mastercard®, or any Albertsons Companies Banner store;  (5) mobile phone cards; (6) all fuel gift cards, including but not limited to Filling Participant gift cards; and (7) all fluid dairy items in the refrigerated dairy section—including fluid dairy substitutes, depending on state and local laws. Bottle/container deposits, sales and other tax payments and bag fees, if applicable, are not purchases and are not eligible to accrue points. For pharmacy purchases, only your out-of-pocket costs (e.g., prescription co-pays) are eligible to accrue Points. Fast Forward and SmartCheck are not accepted as forms of payment at Filling Participant stations. All trademarks are property of their respective owners and are used with permission. Rewards Program may be discontinued or changed at any time without notice. We also reserve the right to modify or cancel any offer and/or correct typographical, pictorial and other ad or pricing errors. Prices for products you order for delivery or pickup through the online grocery ordering service generally are higher than the prices for such products in our physical stores and our online promotions, discounts and offers may differ from those in our physical stores. Void or subject to restrictions based upon applicable law.

offers.disclaimer: *YOUR MAXIMUM GAS REWARD IS $1 PER GALLON AT ALBERTSONS COMPANIES BANNER GAS STATIONS. You accrue one Point for each whole dollar you spend using your Club Card (or entering your telephone number) for ELIGIBLE PURCHASES; for example, if you spend $5.25 you will accrue 5 Points. You may redeem Points only in increments of 100 (each 100 Points equal 1 “reward”): 100 Points = 10¢ per gallon gas reward, 200 Points = 20¢ per gallon gas reward. Point totals of less than 100 (remainders) expire within two calendar months, including the month they are earned in. For example, Points accrued in January expire at the end of February. You may use Points accrued during each month for gas or grocery rewards only through the end of the following calendar month (for example, Rewards accrued in January expire at the end of February). Gas reward savings are limited to 25 gallons for one vehicle per transaction—subject to rounding for Filling Participant in-store fuel transactions and to any transaction dollar limits that your financial institution may place on your payment card. Gas rewards will be available for use at participating Filling Participant stations approximately 4 hours after accrual. In order to redeem gas rewards, you must establish eligibility before pumping fuel. Gas rewards may be redeemed only at Safeway, Acme, Shaws, Jewel, Vons, Randalls, Tom Thumb, Albertsons and Carrs/Safeway branded fuel stations (collectively, “Albertsons Companies Banner stores”) and at participating Filling Participant stations. We may, from time to time, offer grocery rewards to which you may apply accrued rewards. To redeem grocery rewards, you must first register and create an online account (“Account”). You can then access the participating Albertsons Companies Banner stores’ mobile apps or websites to view the grocery reward offers and make your selections. In order to redeem your rewards for an item, the accrued rewards balance in your Account must equal or exceed the value of a grocery rewards offer assigned to that item. Once you select a grocery reward offer and confirm your selection, the applicable rewards are deducted from your Account and cannot be used for another grocery reward offer or as a gas reward. Removing a confirmed grocery reward offer from “My List” will not restore points applied. Please allow up to one hour after redeeming rewards for your rewards balance to be updated. Attempting to reuse rewards that have already been redeemed or applied may result in your rewards balance falling below zero until you accumulate enough rewards to eliminate such deficit. You may claim your redeemed grocery reward offer for an item to be picked up in-store through the end of the following calendar month (for example, grocery rewards offer items redeemed and confirmed in April are available to claim through the end of May). You must pay all applicable taxes and bottle/container deposits for items claimed. See full program details in the Albertsons Companies Banner stores’ mobile apps or websites. ELIGIBLE PURCHASES do not include: (1) beer, wine and tobacco products (and spirits in certain states); (2) automotive services; (3) bus/commuter passes, fishing/hunting licenses and tags, ski/amusement park passes, stamps, lottery/event tickets; (4) any financial instrument that can be redeemed for goods or services at participating Albertsons Companies Banner stores - including (but not limited to) gift certificates, money orders/transfers, and gift or debit cards issued by American Express®, MasterCard®, Visa®, NetSpend®, PayPower™, Green Dot®, Univision Mastercard®, or any Albertsons Companies Banner store;  (5) mobile phone cards; (6) all fuel gift cards, including but not limited to Filling Participant gift cards; and (7) all fluid dairy items in the refrigerated dairy section—including fluid dairy substitutes, depending on state and local laws. Bottle/container deposits, sales and other tax payments and bag fees, if applicable, are not purchases and are not eligible to accrue points. For pharmacy purchases, only your out-of-pocket costs (e.g., prescription co-pays) are eligible to accrue Points. Fast Forward and SmartCheck are not accepted as forms of payment at Filling Participant stations. All trademarks are property of their respective owners and are used with permission. offers.name: On our Exclusive Brands
offers.description: Redeem Points for free products & discounts.*
offers.disclaimer:
*Use Points on groceries or on gas at participating stations. Restrictions and exclusions apply. For full rewards program details, visit rewards details online. One (1) Point will be awarded for each whole dollar spent using your Albertsons Companies for U™ account on eligible/qualifying grocery and pharmacy purchases, and two (2) Points will be earned for each whole dollar spent to purchase eligible gift cards. For example, if you spend $5.25 in a participating Albertsons Companies banner store while using an Albertsons Companies for U™ account, you will earn 5 Points. Each 100 Points earned within two calendar months can be used to earn rewards. You may use Points only in increments of 100 (each 100 Points equal 1 “reward”): 100 Points = $0.10 per gallon Gas reward, 200 Points = $0.20 per gallon Gas reward). Point totals of less than 100 (remainders) expire within two calendar months, including the month they are earned in. For example, Points accrued in January expire at the end of February. For Gas rewards, one reward equals 10 cents off per gallon at our fuel stations. Gas reward savings in a single fuel transaction are limited (i) to 25 gallons for one vehicle per transaction––subject to rounding for Filling Participant in-store fuel transactions and (ii) to the maximum per-gallon gas rewards discount available at our partner fuel stations (usually 20 cents per gallon) and $1.00 off per gallon at in our fuel stations, to any transaction dollar limits that your financial institution may place on your payment card. Gas rewards may not be available for immediate use. Gas rewards may be redeemed only at Safeway, Acme, Shaw’s, Vons, Randalls, Tom Thumb, Albertsons, United Express, Albertsons Market Express, Market Street Express, and Carrs branded fuel stations (collectively, “Albertsons Companies banner stores”) and at participating partner stations. Gas rewards may not be redeemed in the Jewel-Osco market area. We may, from time to time, offer grocery rewards to which you may apply accrued Points.

To use Points, you must first register and create an Albertsons Companies for U™ account. You can then access the participating Albertsons Companies banner stores’ mobile apps or websites to view the grocery reward offers and make your selections. Grocery rewards are available only in the Albertsons Companies banner store that offers such rewards (e.g., if a grocery reward is offered by our Southern California Vons stores, that grocery reward will not be available at other Albertsons Companies banner stores). To use your Points for an item, the accrued Points balance in your Albertsons Companies for U™ account must equal or exceed the Points requirement of that offer; no partial Points will be applied. Once you elect to use Points toward a grocery rewards offer and confirm your offer selection, the applicable Points will be deducted from your Albertsons Companies for U™ account. Points may be reclaimed for reuse until the expiration date specified on the grocery reward offer. Removing a confirmed grocery reward offer from “My List” will not restore Points applied. You may claim the item or discount to which your grocery rewards are applied through the end of the following calendar month (e.g., grocery rewards items selected in April as part of an online order are available for delivery or pick up through the end of May). There may be a lag between the time when you use your Points and when your Points balance is updated. Attempting to reuse Points that have already been applied may result in a negative Points balance until you accumulate enough rewards to eliminate such a deficit. You must pay all applicable taxes and bottle/container deposits for items claimed. See full program details in the Albertsons Companies banner stores’ mobile apps or websites.

Eligible/qualifying purchases exclude: (1) alcoholic beverages and tobacco products; (2) fuel and automotive services; (3) bus/commuter passes, fishing/hunting licenses and tags, ski/amusement park passes, stamps, money orders/transfers, lottery/event tickets; (4) any financial instrument that can be redeemed for goods or services at participating Albertsons Companies banner stores - including (but not limited to) gift certificates, money orders/transfers, and gift or debit cards issued by American Express®, MasterCard®, Visa®, any bank, or any Albertsons Companies banner store; (5) phone cards; (6) fuel gift cards, including but not limited to Filling Participant gift cards; and (7) fluid dairy items in the refrigerated dairy section—including fluid dairy substitutes, depending on state and local laws. Bottle/container deposits, applicable taxes, fees, and other charges, if applicable, are not purchases and are not eligible to accrue points. For pharmacy purchases, only your out-of-pocket costs (e.g., prescription co-pays) are eligible to earn points. One-Touch Fuel™, Scan & Pay, Fast Forward and SmartCheck are not accepted as forms of payment at Filling Participant stations. All trademarks are the property of their respective owners and are used with permission. The rewards program may be discontinued or changed at any time without notice. We also reserve the right to modify or cancel any offer/order and/or correct typographical, pictorial, and other ad or pricing errors. Online promotions, offers, discounts and savings may differ from those in our physical stores. Clearance, single-store, and in-store only specials or promotions may not be available for an online order. Prices for products you order online are based on the price catalog in use at the store that prepares your order. You will pay the prices, fees, and other charges, and receive the promotions, offers, discounts, and savings applicable to your order on the day and time that your order is prepared and processed for final payment, which may be different from those shown in the Estimated Total when you place your order online. Full terms are available at albertsonscompanies.com/about-us/our-policies/terms-of-use.html. Void or subject to restrictions based upon applicable law.

offers.disclaimer:
*Use Points on groceries or on gas at participating stations. Restrictions and exclusions apply. For full rewards program details, visit rewards details online. One (1) Point will be awarded for each whole dollar spent using your Albertsons Companies for U™ account on eligible/qualifying grocery and pharmacy purchases, and two (2) Points will be earned for each whole dollar spent to purchase eligible gift cards. For example, if you spend $5.25 in a participating Albertsons Companies banner store while using an Albertsons Companies for U™ account, you will earn 5 Points. Each 100 Points earned within two calendar months can be used to earn rewards. You may use Points only in increments of 100 (each 100 Points equal 1 “reward”): 100 Points = $0.10 per gallon Gas reward, 200 Points = $0.20 per gallon Gas reward). Point totals of less than 100 (remainders) expire within two calendar months, including the month they are earned in. For example, Points accrued in January expire at the end of February. For Gas rewards, one reward equals 10 cents off per gallon at our fuel stations. Gas reward savings in a single fuel transaction are limited (i) to 25 gallons for one vehicle per transaction––subject to rounding for Filling Participant in-store fuel transactions and (ii) to the maximum per-gallon gas rewards discount available at our partner fuel stations (usually 20 cents per gallon) and $1.00 off per gallon at in our fuel stations, to any transaction dollar limits that your financial institution may place on your payment card. Gas rewards may not be available for immediate use. Gas rewards may be redeemed only at Safeway, Acme, Shaw’s, Vons, Randalls, Tom Thumb, Albertsons, and Carrs branded fuel stations (collectively, “Albertsons Companies banner stores”) and at participating partner stations. Gas rewards may not be redeemed in the Jewel-Osco market area. We may, from time to time, offer grocery rewards to which you may apply accrued Points.

To use Points, you must first register and create an Albertsons Companies for U™ account. You can then access the participating Albertsons Companies banner stores’ mobile apps or websites to view the grocery reward offers and make your selections. Grocery rewards are available only in the Albertsons Companies banner store that offers such rewards (e.g., if a grocery reward is offered by our Southern California Vons stores, that grocery reward will not be available at other Albertsons Companies banner stores). To use your Points for an item, the accrued Points balance in your Albertsons Companies for U™ account must equal or exceed the Points requirement of that offer; no partial Points will be applied. Once you elect to use Points toward a grocery rewards offer and confirm your offer selection, the applicable Points will be deducted from your Albertsons Companies for U™ account. Points may be reclaimed for reuse until the expiration date specified on the grocery reward offer. Removing a confirmed grocery reward offer from “My List” will not restore Points applied. You may claim the item or discount to which your grocery rewards are applied through the end of the following calendar month (e.g., grocery rewards items selected in April as part of an online order are available for delivery or pick up through the end of May). There may be a lag between the time when you use your Points and when your Points balance is updated. Attempting to reuse Points that have already been applied may result in a negative Points balance until you accumulate enough rewards to eliminate such a deficit. You must pay all applicable taxes and bottle/container deposits for items claimed. See full program details in the Albertsons Companies banner stores’ mobile apps or websites.

Eligible/qualifying purchases exclude: (1) alcoholic beverages and tobacco products; (2) fuel and automotive services; (3) bus/commuter passes, fishing/hunting licenses and tags, ski/amusement park passes, stamps, money orders/transfers, lottery/event tickets; (4) any financial instrument that can be redeemed for goods or services at participating Albertsons Companies banner stores - including (but not limited to) gift certificates, money orders/transfers, and gift or debit cards issued by American Express®, MasterCard®, Visa®, any bank, or any Albertsons Companies banner store; (5) phone cards; (6) fuel gift cards, including but not limited to Filling Participant gift cards; and (7) fluid dairy items in the refrigerated dairy section—including fluid dairy substitutes, depending on state and local laws. Bottle/container deposits, applicable taxes, fees, and other charges, if applicable, are not purchases and are not eligible to accrue points. For pharmacy purchases, only your out-of-pocket costs (e.g., prescription co-pays) are eligible to earn points. One-Touch Fuel™, Scan & Pay, Fast Forward and SmartCheck are not accepted as forms of payment at Filling Participant stations. All trademarks are the property of their respective owners and are used with permission. The rewards program may be discontinued or changed at any time without notice. We also reserve the right to modify or cancel any offer/order and/or correct typographical, pictorial, and other ad or pricing errors. Online promotions, offers, discounts and savings may differ from those in our physical stores. Clearance, single-store, and in-store only specials or promotions may not be available for an online order. Prices for products you order online are based on the price catalog in use at the store that prepares your order. You will pay the prices, fees, and other charges, and receive the promotions, offers, discounts, and savings applicable to your order on the day and time that your order is prepared and processed for final payment, which may be different from those shown in the Estimated Total when you place your order online. Full terms are available at albertsonscompanies.com/about-us/our-policies/terms-of-use.html. Void or subject to restrictions based upon applicable law.

You can then access the participating Albertsons Companies banner stores’ mobile apps or websites to view the grocery reward offers and make your selections. Grocery rewards are available only in the Albertsons Companies banner store that offers such rewards (e.g., if a grocery reward is offered by our Southern California Vons stores, that grocery reward will not be available at other Albertsons Companies banner stores). To use your Points for an item, the accrued Points balance in your Albertsons for U™ or Safeway for U™ account must equal or exceed the Points requirement of that offer; no partial Points will be applied. Once you elect to use Points toward a grocery rewards offer and confirm your offer selection, the applicable Points will be deducted from your Albertsons for U™ or Safeway for U™ account. Points may be reclaimed for reuse until the expiration date specified on the Grocery reward offer. Removing a confirmed grocery reward offer from “My List” will not restore Points applied. You may claim the item or discount to which your grocery rewards are applied through the end of the following calendar month (e.g., grocery rewards items selected in April as part of an online order are available for delivery or pick up through the end of May). There may be a lag between the time when you use your Points and when your Points balance is updated. Attempting to reuse Points that have already been applied may result in a negative Points balance until you accumulate enough rewards to eliminate such a deficit.
